name: PubMed Extract Workflow
summary: Open a PubMed article page and extract title, authors+affiliations, abstract, journal, dates, identifiers, and full-text links.
description: Navigate to https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/{pmid}/ and walk the article page to extract title, abstract, journal, publication date, PMID, DOI, PMC id, keywords/MeSH terms, authors with affiliations, cited-by count, and the list of full-text links shown on the page. Use to enrich a known PMID. Do not use to search PubMed (use pubmed search).

pmid.description: Numeric PubMed ID (e.g. 33495757). Bare digits only — do not include 'PMID:' or a full URL.

steps.name: Extract keywords (returns empty array when none present)

inputs.script: const norm=(s)=>(s||'').replace(/\u00a0/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const meta=(n)=>{const e=document.querySelector('meta[name="'+n+'"]');return e?e.getAttribute('content'):null};const el=document.querySelector('#full-view-journal-trigger, button.journal-actions-trigger, .journal-actions-trigger, .journal-title');const short=el?norm(el.textContent):'';const full=norm(meta('citation_journal_title')||'');const text=full||short;return {text:text,short:short,full:full};

const norm=(s)=>(s||'').replace(/\u00a0/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const meta=(n)=>{const e=document.querySelector('meta[name="'+n+'"]');return e?e.getAttribute('content'):null};const el=document.querySelector('span.cit, .citation .cit, .pub-date');const cit=el?norm(el.textContent):'';const iso=norm(meta('citation_date')||'');return {text:cit||iso,citation:cit,iso:iso};

const norm=(s)=>(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const meta=(n)=>{const e=document.querySelector('meta[name="'+n+'"]');return e?e.getAttribute('content'):null};const idLink=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a.id-link')).find(a=>/^PMC\d+/i.test((a.textContent||'').trim()));let v=idLink?norm(idLink.textContent):'';if(!v){const m=meta('citation_pmcid');if(m)v=norm(m);}if(!v){const anchors=document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="PMC"]');for(const a of anchors){const h=a.getAttribute('href')||'';const m=h.match(/PMC\d+/);if(m){v=m[0];break;}}}return {text:v};

const norm=(s)=>(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const anchors=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.full-text-links-list a.link-item, .full-text-links-list .link-item a, .full-text-links a.link-item'));const seen=new Set();const out=[];for(const a of anchors){const href=a.getAttribute('href')||'';if(!href||seen.has(href))continue;seen.add(href);const inner=a.querySelector('.link-name, .source, img[alt]');let source=inner?(inner.textContent||inner.getAttribute('alt')||'').trim():'';if(!source)source=norm(a.textContent);let url=href;if(url&&url.startsWith('/'))url=location.origin+url;out.push({source:source,url:url});}return out;

steps.name: Extract cited by (visible items + link to full list)

help.summary: Open a PubMed article page and extract title, authors+affiliations, abstract, journal, dates, identifiers, and full-text links.

parameters.pmid: Numeric PubMed ID (e.g. 33495757). Bare digits only — do not include 'PMID:' or a full URL.

examples.description: Fetch the article record for PMID 33495757.

returns: Primary output: array of full-text link entries — { source, url } — from the 'Full text links' module. Title, abstract, authors+affiliations, keywords/MeSH, journal, publication date, PMID, DOI, PMC id, and cited-by count are produced by upstream steps (s3..s11, s13) and surface as step-level results rather than the final output.
notes: Selector coverage is broad on purpose because PubMed ships several layout variants — empty fields are common when a particular element is absent on a given record (e.g. no DOI, no PMC).
Use pubmed search to resolve a query into PMIDs first, then feed PMIDs into this workflow one at a time.
